## Summary

Describe the change and the problem it solves.

## Testing

List the commands you ran, for example:

```bash
pnpm check
```

## Screenshots

Add screenshots or recordings for UI changes when they help reviewers.

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran the relevant validation commands locally.
- [ ] I updated docs or environment examples if setup changed.
- [ ] I noted any follow-up work, tradeoffs, or known limitations.
